creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
# portlint -A
FATAL: Makefile: The package base name "cronolog" is already in use by the "sysutils/cronolog" port. Choose another PORTNAME or use a PKGNAMEPREFIX or PKGNAMESUFFIX.

The PKGNAME variable is cronolog-1.7.2. You shouldn't remove PKGNAMESUFFIX or use in PORTNAME variable. And please use DISTVERSION instead of PORTVERSION.
